$comment: Project permissions for the KUDBEE/HERMES training loop. Goal: the model-training agents (this repo + the Lightning GPU agent) run the safe, repeated commands WITHOUT stopping to ask, while the genuinely dangerous ones stay gated. This is the opt-in-per-command discipline from CLAUDE.md's security section made mechanical — NOT a blanket bypass. `deny` always wins over `allow`. Docs: docs/agent-autonomy.md. VERIFICATION DISCIPLINE (2026-07-07): CLI commands for external tools (litgpt, Lightning Studio) are validated via /test-command skill before shipping. Handoffs use /handoff skill and include explicit verification checklists. See CLAUDE.md 'Command generation' and 'Agent handoff completion' sections.

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"KUDBEE living-state discipline: at session start read brain/modelFamily.json (the model catalog), brain/handoffs.json (the cross-agent log), TODO.md and IDEAS.md. Every behavior PR updates TODO.md + IDEAS.md + brain/roadmap.json together and regenerates the status board (GEN_DOCS=1 npx vitest run status); capture new ideas in IDEAS.md the moment they are said; end a session by appending a brain/handoffs.json entry. A PR that skips the living-state sync is not done (CLAUDE.md)."}}'

d=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$d" | grep -qE '^(lib/|components/|app/)'; then if ! echo "$d" | grep -qE '(TODO[.]md|IDEAS[.]md|brain/roadmap[.]json)'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Living-state reminder: product code changed but TODO.md / IDEAS.md / brain/roadmap.json are not in the working diff. Per CLAUDE.md, sync the living state, regenerate the status board (GEN_DOCS=1 npx vitest run status), and consider a brain/handoffs.json entry before wrapping up."}'; fi; fi
